prompt:
A finished stacked astrophotography image presented as a glossy print or tablet display, showing a dramatic spiral of star trails around a central point with a softly color-balanced foreground silhouette of trees or low hills. The star trails are smooth and continuous, implying many aligned long exposures combined into a single processed result; no captions or readable markings appear on the print/display.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a grounded near-future solarpunk studio vibe: soft cinematic lighting, realistic print sheen or screen reflections, no logos, and no readable text. Keep the star-trail spiral as the unmistakable focal content, clean and icon-friendly.
